security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; frame-src 'self' http: https:

bundle.shortDescription: A control room of live terminals
bundle.longDescription: Loom is a Linux-first desktop terminal multiplexer: many real PTYs arranged in resizable split grids and a left workspace rail, tuned for driving fleets of CLI agents — including broadcast-input to prompt many panes at once.
